channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ed O’Brien Says Radiohead Will Play 20 Shows on a Different Continent Every Year Starting in 2027
item.description: 🎶✈️ Pack your bags, Radiohead fans! 🌍 Ed O’Brien spills the beans on the band's global tour plans! #Radiohead2027 🌏🎸

item.title: BTS Reveal New ‘The Return’ Doc Trailer: ‘Where We’re Meant to Be’
item.description: Dive into BTS's world 🌟🎶 New doc trailer alert! 🎬 Follow their journey to 'The Return' 🌏 #BTSARMY #TheReturnDoc

item.title: Jack Black to Host, Jack White to Perform on Super-Jack Saturday Night Live
item.description: 🤘 Saturday Night Live just got a double dose of Jack! Get ready for an epic night of music and laughs! 🎸 #SNL #JackBlack #JackWhite

item.title: Band of Horses and Dinosaur Jr. Announce 2026 Co-Headlining Tour
item.description: 🎸 Rock legends unite! Band of Horses and Dinosaur Jr. hitting the road together in 2026. Prepare for an epic tour! 🤘 #MusicNews

item.title: Just Like Heaven 2026 has The Strokes, LCD Soundsystem, more
item.description: 🎶 Festival dreams come true! Just Like Heaven 2026 lineup bringing The Strokes, LCD Soundsystem, and more! Let's dance! 💃🕺 #MusicFestMadness
